about.title: About JSLTCC
about.hero: Empowering Sri Lankans to reach Japan and beyond since 2002.
about.story: The Japan Sri Lanka Technology & Cultural Centre (JSLTCC) was established in 2002 with a single mission: to bridge the gap between Sri Lankan students and world-class education opportunities in Japan. Over two decades, we have grown into a trusted institution, guiding more than 5,000 students through language training, university placements, and visa processes.
about.mission: To provide accessible, high-quality Japanese language education and overseas study placement services that empower Sri Lankan students to build global careers.
about.vision: To be the leading Japan-Sri Lanka educational bridge, recognized for quality, integrity, and the success of our graduates.
